tasks.title: Add authentication dependencies
tasks.description: Add required npm packages for API-based authentication: axios (HTTP client), tough-cookie (cookie jar), http-cookie-agent (axios cookie integration), otplib (TOTP generation), jsonwebtoken (JWT decode), dotenv (environment variables)

tasks.title: Implement Cognito JWT authentication
tasks.description: Create authenticateWithCognito() function that handles AWS Cognito authentication with TOTP 2FA. Flow: InitiateAuth (username/password) → Generate TOTP code → RespondToAuthChallenge → Return JWT IdToken
acceptanceCriteria: Handles all Cognito error types (NotAuthorizedException, CodeMismatchException, ExpiredCodeException, etc.)
Function exported for use in other modules

tasks.title: Implement JWT token caching
tasks.description: Create getCognitoToken() wrapper with file-based token caching (.sf360-token-cache). Cache tokens for 1 hour with JWT decode validation. Include warmupCache() and clearCache() helpers.
acceptanceCriteria: Validates token with isTokenValid() using jsonwebtoken.decode
Reuses valid cached token (logs time remaining)
Gets new token if cache miss or expired
Graceful degradation if file operations fail

tasks.title: Implement SSO login and cookie extraction
tasks.description: Create loginToSSO() function that authenticates with SF360 SSO using JWT token, selects firm, and extracts cookies in Playwright format. Uses tough-cookie jar with axios.
acceptanceCriteria: Creates axios instance with tough-cookie jar
Formats cookies for Playwright (handles expires, sameSite)
Memory cache for SSO sessions (30 min expiry)
Handles invalid JWT and invalid firm errors

tasks.title: Create test data factory module
tasks.description: Create data-factory.js with functions to generate unique test data: contacts, funds, members, TFN, ABN, dates. Uses timestamp + random for uniqueness.
acceptanceCriteria: generateContactData() function generates unique person data with timestamp
generateFundData() function generates unique fund names
generateMemberData() function wraps generateContactData with 'Member' prefix
generateDateOfBirth() generates dates within age range (default 18-80)
All functions return ready-to-use data objects

tasks.title: Update environment template
tasks.description: Update .env.template to include all required configuration for Cognito JWT auth, SSO login, and SF360 server access.

tasks.title: Add token cache to gitignore
tasks.description: Add .sf360-token-cache to .gitignore to prevent committing JWT tokens to version control.
acceptanceCriteria: Entry includes comment explaining it's for JWT token caching
